title: Lead Revenue Manager at Massive Restaurants

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Massive Restaurants
jsonLd.description:
We at Massive Restaurants are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Chennai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Massive Restaurants:
Massive Restaurants is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Massive Restaurants!
